name: Втроём — улица ночью, дождь, треугольник

visual_parameters.location: rainy city street, neon reflections on wet asphalt
visual_parameters.clothing_kira: crimson evening coat over dark dress, heels, umbrella tilted
visual_parameters.clothing_sergey: black leather jacket, dark jeans, hands in pockets
visual_parameters.clothing_user: dark wool coat, walking beside Kira
visual_parameters.pose: Kira walking between two men, umbrella creating red canopy above all three, Sergey walking slightly behind on left looking at her, User on right holding her elbow lightly, rain falling, all three reflected in wet asphalt
visual_parameters.lighting: neon signs reflecting on wet ground, street lamp halo, rain catching light
visual_parameters.mood: noir triangle, forbidden walk, city as witness, fleeting moment
visual_parameters.camera: cinematic wide shot from low angle, wet asphalt reflection, rain droplets in foreground
visual_parameters.quality: 8K, film grain, chromatic aberration from neon, rain motion blur

qwen_prompt: Athletic 24yo dark blonde curly woman in crimson evening coat over dark dress with heels, walking between two men under tilted red umbrella creating canopy above them, 27yo athletic man with dark blonde short hair in black leather jacket and dark jeans walking slightly behind on left looking at her, second man in dark wool coat on right lightly holding her elbow, rainy city street at night with neon signs reflecting on wet asphalt, street lamp halo, rain catching light and falling, cinematic wide shot from low angle showing all three reflected in wet ground, rain droplets in foreground, noir street photography style, photorealistic, 8K, film grain, chromatic aberration from neon lights, rain motion blur
negative_prompt: blurry faces, plastic skin, doll-like, deformed hands, extra fingers, oversaturated, watermark, childlike, anime, cartoon, kissing, explicit embrace, nudity
notes: Noir street photography framing. Umbrella creates natural triangle composition. Reflection in wet asphalt doubles the drama. No explicit contact — only elbow hold (socially acceptable).
